title: celmisia discolor var. intermedia
intro: Celmisia discolor var. intermedia, also known as the New Zealand plantain or mountain plantain, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from rheumatic pain. Celmisia discolor var. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
